items.raw_desc: Masszírozó gép GESKE Warm & Cool Eye Energizer 6in1 bronz:The GESKE Warm & Cool Eye Energizer 6in1 Massager gives you salon-like eye care. The device emits 11,000 sonic pulses to firm the skin and relieve tension in the eye muscles. The treatment reduces fine lines, dark circles, fatigue and puffiness of the eye area.  It also intensively promotes the absorption of eye creams and serums. The device uses two technologies: warming and cooling. In the warm function, the surface of the device is heated to 45 °C, which speeds up the blood circulation in the eye area and thus relaxes tired eyes.
